baby.name: Lil' Sporty Banana
baby.about: A tasty little fruit and a great healthy snack to keep you energised for play time.
likes: Lil' Sporty Banana likes playing footy with his dad, Sporty Banana. They practice kicking goals together at the local footy oval.
Lil' Super Fruity zooms around Healthy Town to practice being the next leader of the Superhero Foods.
baby.superPowers: Loaded with fibre to keep your gut healthy.
baby.use: Mash with a fork for an easy snack to feed to bubs.

baby.name: Lil' Broc
baby.about: Lightly steamed and tastes great and reduces the loss of vitamins.
likes: Lil' Broc loves to play with the other Superhero Food Babies at playgroup.
Lil' Mean Green enjoys being outside and exploring all the hiding places within Vegie Zone.
baby.superPowers: A bundle of vitamins and minerals.
baby.use: Try brocollini or broccoli chopped up into small pieces and add to your next pasta for a green burst of goodness.

baby.name: Lil' Lean Meat
baby.about: Try a tasty chop or chew on your meat cut into soldiers.
likes: Lil' Lean Meat is always reading books about the world. He wants to travel to every country when he grows up.
Lil' Beefy Boy loves doing athletics to build his strength. He wants to lift weights at the Grazing Land Gymnasium when he's older.
baby.superPowers: Packed with iron and protein to build a strong body.
baby.use: Did you know red meat is the best source of Iron? Eat meat with iron helpers like fruit and veg to help our bodies absorb Iron.

baby.name: Lil' Milk Maid
baby.about: Plain milk is a great way to quench your thirst.
likes: Lil’ Milk Maid is learning how to hula-hoop. She is practicing for the school assembly.
Lil’ Mighty Milk has lots of fun at the Dairy Park. Sliding down the giant milk slide is her favourite.
baby.superPowers: Brimming vwith calcium to build super strong bones and teeth.
baby.use: Water and milk are the best choice when you’re thirsty.

baby.name: Lil' Mixed Grain
baby.about: Yummy as a snack when toasted with a thin spread of vegemite.
likes: Lil’ Mixed Grain likes spending time in the grain fields. He loves helping out during the harvest.
Lil’ Toasty enjoys firing up his flames to blast his way around Healthy Town.
baby.superPowers: Boosts your energy to keep you active.
baby.use: Spread with avocado and cut into small pieces for a nutritious snack for little hands.

everyday.name: Postie Porridge
everyday.about: Sprinkle over other breakfast cereals for an extra boost of fibre.
likes: Rain, hail or shine, Postie Porridge delivers all the mail and parcels in Healthy Town.
Powerful Porridge has lots of fun flying through the Grain Fields at lighting speed.
everyday.superPowers: Helps power you up at breakfast time to blast you into your day.
everyday.use: Add oats to any breakfast cereal to add extra flavour. Toast the oats first for extra yumminess.

everyday.name: DJ Corn
everyday.about: Eating corn on the cob can be some messy fun!
likes: DJ Corn loves to pump out the music to his crowd of corn friends from the Vegie Zone.
King Corn protects and rules over his land to protect all the citizens of Tucker Island.
everyday.superPowers: Every kernel is rich in vitamins to fight away illness.
everyday.use: Add tinned corn to any savoury meal to make it more colourful and fun! Cut it from the cob if you prefer.

everyday.name: Fresh Fish
everyday.about: Fo fishing to catch your own fish - you can't get any fresher!
likes: Fresh Fish delights in swimming through the Aqua Ocean collecting shells and sea grass.
With her trusty trident, The Sea Raider creates the weather in Tucker Island. She loves to make rainbows.
everyday.superPowers: Powerhouse of omega-3 fatty acids for a healthy heart
everyday.use: Swap out red meat for fish next time at dinner. Add a squeeze of lemon for a flavour boost.

villain.name: Illness
villain.specialPowers: Attacks the body when defences are low. Wears out the immune system.

villain.name: Obesity
villain.specialPowers: Hides fat in the body, steals fitness and slows you down.

villain.name: Decay
villain.specialPowers: Rots teeth making them weak. He hates hygiene.

zombie.name: Zombie Choc
zombie.zombiePowers: Rots teeth and stores fat in the body.

zombie.name: Zombie Chips
zombie.zombiePowers: Stuffed full of fat and salt - best friends with obesity.

zombie.name: Zombie Energy
zombie.zombiePowers: Crammed with sugar and caffeine – stresses out the brain, heart and body.

zombie.name: Zombie Donut
zombie.zombiePowers: Seething with sugar and fat – drains energy & makes the body sluggish.

zombie.name: Zombie Fizz
zombie.zombiePowers: Sugar overload - best friends with decay.
